etymology.description: Depicts something carved/engraved -> proto-form of 㓞 (carving tool); unrelated to 丰 (abundance or plenty)
etymology.interpretation: The character 丯 (jiè, 'aid') is originally a pictogram showing an object that is carved or engraved, suggesting its connection to manual or artistic intervention. This carved form visually represents the concept of aid by implying attentiveness or deliberate shaping. It serves as a proto-form for 㓞, which indicates the act of carving or cutting, thereby aligning with the notion of aid provided through skill and craft.
